problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Bacteriophage surface display for targeting may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
